title: Assertion `pColl1 && (pParse->nErr || pColl2)' failed.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER );
CREATE TABLE test_table2 ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INTEGER, value REAL, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test_table1(id) );
INSERT INTO test_table1 (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), ('Charlie', 25);
INSERT INTO test_table2 (ref_id, value) VALUES (1, 10.5), (2, 20.0), (1, NULL);

SELECT DISTINCT * FROM test_table1 LEFT JOIN test_table2 ON test_table1.id = test_table2.ref_id AND test_table2.value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table2 WHERE ref_id IS NOT NULL) WHERE test_table1.age > 20;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with complex subquery and condition
